description_long: This chair features a modern, minimalist design with a square, quilted seat and backrest upholstered in a muted green fabric. The upholstery has a subtle diamond-stitched pattern, giving it a plush and inviting appearance. The seat and backrest are generously padded, providing comfort for extended sitting. The chair is supported by a sturdy, four-pronged metal base with a matte brass or bronze finish, adding a touch of sophistication. The absence of armrests and the clean lines make it suitable for contemporary urban interiors such as lobbies, lounges, or waiting areas. Its compact form and neutral color palette allow it to blend seamlessly into various urban environments.
description: A modern green upholstered chair with a quilted seat and backrest, supported by a four-pronged metal base in a brass finish. The chair is armless and features a plush, diamond-stitched pattern.
description_view_0: Front view shows the square, quilted seat and backrest with visible stitching and no armrests.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the thickness of the padded seat and backrest, as well as the angled support from the metal base.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the smooth, slightly textured backrest and the full width of the metal base.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the seat's depth and the chair's armless profile.
